summary: The CI 'Run prettier' job exited with a non-zero status while mentioning packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js, causing the workflow to fail.
root_cause: Prettier (invoked via yarn) returned a non-zero exit code while processing packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js.

evidence.reason: File path mentioned in the log, indicating which file was touched/checked when the job failed.

evidence.quote: error Command failed with exit code 1.
evidence.reason: Shows the command (yarn/prettier) exited with a non-zero status, causing the job failure.

evidence.quote: info Visit https://yarnpkg.com/en/docs/cli/run for documentation about this command.
evidence.reason: Indicates the failing command was run via yarn (typical for running prettier in this repo).
Identifies the CI job that failed, tying the exit code to a Prettier run.

suggested_fix: Run the Prettier check locally and fix formatting: e.g. run `yarn prettier --check packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js` to see issues, then `yarn prettier --write packages/react-dom/src/__tests__/ReactDOMFragmentRefs-test.js` and commit the formatted changes.
